diff:
diff --git a/src/preview.py b/src/preview.py
index 09f54fe..5728eb7 100644
--- a/src/preview.py
+++ b/src/preview.py
@@ -1,6 +1,11 @@
 def preview_text(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
     if limit < 0:
         raise ValueError("limit must be non-negative")
+    # If the text fits within the limit, return it unchanged
     if len(text) <= limit:
         return text
-    return text[:limit] + "..."
+    # For very small limits (3 or less), we cannot add an ellipsis without exceeding the limit
+    if limit <= 3:
+        return text[:limit]
+    # Otherwise, truncate to limit-3 characters and add an ellipsis
+    return text[:limit - 3] + "..."
